subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Goal of the world, Who hath confirmed the leaf in extolling the Divine Tree, bestowed grace and shown the way [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود عالم را که ورقه را بر ثناء سدره تایید فرمود توفیق بخشید و راه نمود
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
